sentences.t: 我找它找得连自己在找什么都忘了。
sentences.en: I looked for it so much that I no longer remember what I was looking for.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǎo tā zhǎo de lián zìjǐ zài zhǎo shénme dōu wàng le.

sentences.t: 我把车卖了，因为养它太贵了。
sentences.en: I sold my car because it was too expensive to keep.
sentences.r: Wǒ bǎ chē mài le, yīnwèi yǎng tā tài guì le.

sentences.t: 马可说他昨天做了一百遍西班牙语练习。
sentences.en: Marco says he did a hundred Spanish reps yesterday.
sentences.r: Marco shuō tā zuótiān zuò le yìbǎi biàn Xībānyáyǔ liànxí.

sentences.t: 马可说光说不如去做。
sentences.en: Marco says doing beats just talking.
sentences.r: Marco shuō guāng shuō bùrú qù zuò.

sentences.t: 我想喝杯咖啡，但我没时间。
sentences.en: I feel like a coffee, but I don't have time.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng hē bēi kāfēi, dàn wǒ méi shíjiān.

sentences.t: 医生跟我说我得多休息。
sentences.en: The doctor told me I have to rest more.
sentences.r: Yīshēng gēn wǒ shuō wǒ děi duō xiūxi.

sentences.t: 要是那么疼，你该去看看医生。
sentences.en: If it hurts that much, you should see a doctor.
sentences.r: Yàoshi nàme téng, nǐ gāi qù kànkan yīshēng.

sentences.t: 看，这是我朋友卡洛斯，墨西哥人。
sentences.en: Look, this is my friend Carlos, he's from Mexico.
sentences.r: Kàn, zhè shì wǒ péngyou Kǎluòsī, Mòxīgē rén.

sentences.t: 我喜欢咖啡，但我更爱茶。
sentences.en: I like coffee, but I love tea.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan kāfēi, dàn wǒ gèng ài chá.

sentences.t: 我知道那地方，但不知道晚上怎么去。
sentences.en: I know the place, but I don't know how to get there at night.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào nà dìfang, dàn bù zhīdào wǎnshang zěnme qù.

sentences.t: 对我来说，这杯咖啡比那杯好。
sentences.en: For me, this coffee is better than the other one.
sentences.r: Duì wǒ lái shuō, zhè bēi kāfēi bǐ nà bēi hǎo.

sentences.t: 我一回家就坐到沙发上。
sentences.en: When I get home, I sit on the couch.
sentences.r: Wǒ yì huíjiā jiù zuò dào shāfā shàng.

sentences.t: 开始不需要太多，你只要开始就行。
sentences.en: You don't need much to start, you just have to start.
sentences.r: Kāishǐ bù xūyào tài duō, nǐ zhǐyào kāishǐ jiù xíng.

sentences.t: 虽然我不舒服，但我还是出去一会儿。
sentences.en: Even though I feel bad, I'm going out for a while.
sentences.r: Suīrán wǒ bù shūfu, dàn wǒ háishi chūqù yíhuìr.

sentences.t: 我认识他妹妹，但不知道她叫什么。
sentences.en: I know his sister, but I don't know her name.
sentences.r: Wǒ rènshi tā mèimei, dàn bù zhīdào tā jiào shénme.

sentences.t: 我不认识任何懂得跟你一样多的人。
sentences.en: I don't know anyone who knows as much as you.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú rènshi rènhé dǒng de gēn nǐ yíyàng duō de rén.

sentences.t: 马可总是没钱，却总想买书。
sentences.en: Marco never has money, but he always wants to buy books.
sentences.r: Marco zǒngshì méi qián, què zǒng xiǎng mǎi shū.

sentences.t: 你给我点时间，我就教你这一切怎么用。
sentences.en: If you give me time, I'll show you how everything works.
sentences.r: Nǐ gěi wǒ diǎn shíjiān, wǒ jiù jiāo nǐ zhè yíqiè zěnme yòng.

sentences.t: 你便宜卖给我的话，我现在就买。
sentences.en: If you sell it to me cheap, I'll buy it right now.
sentences.r: Nǐ piányi mài gěi wǒ de huà, wǒ xiànzài jiù mǎi.

sentences.t: 我得提醒自己，不用今天就把所有事做完。
sentences.en: I need to remember I don't have to do it all today.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi tíxǐng zìjǐ, bú yòng jīntiān jiù bǎ suǒyǒu shì zuò wán.

sentences.t: 我越了解她，就越知道自己很幸运。
sentences.en: The more I get to know her, the more I know I'm lucky.
sentences.r: Wǒ yuè liǎojiě tā, jiù yuè zhīdào zìjǐ hěn xìngyùn.

sentences.t: 他懂好多书上的东西，却不熟悉街道。
sentences.en: He knows a lot about books, but he doesn't know the streets.
sentences.r: Tā dǒng hǎoduō shū shàng de dōngxi, què bù shúxī jiēdào.

sentences.t: 我去去就回，帮我点杯咖啡，马上回来。
sentences.en: Order me a coffee while I step away for a sec, I'll be right back.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù qù jiù huí, bāng wǒ diǎn bēi kāfēi, mǎshàng huílái.

sentences.t: 我们住得离市中心很远，不过房子很安静。
sentences.en: We live far from downtown, but the house is quiet.
sentences.r: Wǒmen zhù de lí shìzhōngxīn hěn yuǎn, búguò fángzi hěn ānjìng.

sentences.t: 你今天开始，明天就已经多懂一点了。
sentences.en: If you start today, tomorrow you already know a little more.
sentences.r: Nǐ jīntiān kāishǐ, míngtiān jiù yǐjīng duō dǒng yìdiǎn le.

sentences.t: 以前很便宜，现在什么都翻倍了。
sentences.en: It used to be cheap, but now everything costs double.
sentences.r: Yǐqián hěn piányi, xiànzài shénme dōu fānbèi le.

sentences.t: 要是有更多时间，我想去旅行、去练习。
sentences.en: If I had more time, I'd like to travel and practice.
sentences.r: Yàoshi yǒu gèng duō shíjiān, wǒ xiǎng qù lǚxíng、qù liànxí.

sentences.t: 你得享受过程，而不只是终点。
sentences.en: You've got to enjoy the journey, not just the finish.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi xiǎngshòu guòchéng, ér bù zhǐshì zhōngdiǎn.

sentences.t: 我不在乎他们说什么，跟我说实话。
sentences.en: I don't care what they say, give me the truth.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú zàihu tāmen shuō shénme, gēn wǒ shuō shíhuà.

sentences.t: 我会说，但还不知道用哪些词才对。
sentences.en: I know how to speak, but I still don't know the right words.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì shuō, dàn hái bù zhīdào yòng nǎxiē cí cái duì.

sentences.t: 马可想卖他的字典，但没人愿意付钱。
sentences.en: Marco tried to sell his dictionary, but nobody wanted to pay.
sentences.r: Marco xiǎng mài tā de zìdiǎn, dàn méi rén yuànyì fùqián.

sentences.t: 我喜欢那部电影，但有点长。
sentences.en: I liked the movie, but it was a bit long.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan nà bù diànyǐng, dàn yǒudiǎn cháng.

sentences.t: 我不喜欢早起，但我得工作。
sentences.en: I don't like getting up early, but I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xǐhuan zǎoqǐ, dàn wǒ děi gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我每次吃那个，肚子都疼。
sentences.en: Every time I eat that, my stomach hurts.
sentences.r: Wǒ měi cì chī nàge, dùzi dōu téng.

sentences.t: 你不用完美，你只要开始就行。
sentences.en: You don't have to be perfect, you just have to start.
sentences.r: Nǐ bú yòng wánměi, nǐ zhǐyào kāishǐ jiù xíng.

sentences.t: 我知道你不认识我，但相信我。
sentences.en: I know you don't know me, but trust me.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào nǐ bú rènshi wǒ, dàn xiāngxìn wǒ.

sentences.t: 马可住在你床底下，吃你的袜子。
sentences.en: Marco lives under your bed and eats your socks.
sentences.r: Marco zhù zài nǐ chuáng dǐxia, chī nǐ de wàzi.

sentences.t: 我绕了一个小时，市中心还是很远。
sentences.en: I've been going in circles for an hour and downtown is still far.
sentences.r: Wǒ rào le yí ge xiǎoshí, shìzhōngxīn háishi hěn yuǎn.

sentences.t: 去年夏天我去了海边，特别喜欢。
sentences.en: I went to the beach last summer and I loved it.
sentences.r: Qùnián xiàtiān wǒ qù le hǎibiān, tèbié xǐhuan.

sentences.t: 马可尝了辣酱，现在话都说不出来了。
sentences.en: Marco tried the hot sauce and now he can't talk.
sentences.r: Marco cháng le làjiàng, xiànzài huà dōu shuō bu chūlái le.

sentences.t: 马可从不困，他只是想要更多语言。
sentences.en: Marco is never sleepy, he just craves more languages.
sentences.r: Marco cóng bú kùn, tā zhǐshì xiǎng yào gèng duō yǔyán.

sentences.t: 我就这个年纪，我也挺满意的。
sentences.en: I'm the age I am and I'm okay with that.
sentences.r: Wǒ jiù zhège niánjì, wǒ yě tǐng mǎnyì de.

sentences.t: 这么小的东西怎么会这么贵，我搞不懂。
sentences.en: I don't get why it costs so much when it's so small.
sentences.r: Zhème xiǎo de dōngxi zěnme huì zhème guì, wǒ gǎo bu dǒng.

sentences.t: 我弟弟喜欢足球胜过学习。
sentences.en: My brother likes soccer more than studying.
sentences.r: Wǒ dìdi xǐhuan zúqiú shèngguò xuéxí.

sentences.t: 点餐前我总会问什么最好吃。
sentences.en: Before ordering, I always ask what the tastiest thing is.
sentences.r: Diǎncān qián wǒ zǒng huì wèn shénme zuì hǎochī.

sentences.t: 昨天我很紧张，因为那是我第一次说西班牙语。
sentences.en: Yesterday I was nervous because it was my first time speaking Spanish.
sentences.r: Zuótiān wǒ hěn jǐnzhāng, yīnwèi nà shì wǒ dì-yī cì shuō Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.t: 我喜欢尝每个去过的国家的菜。
sentences.en: I like trying the food from every country I visit.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan cháng měi ge qù guò de guójiā de cài.

sentences.t: 火车要是晚点，我们就打车去市中心。
sentences.en: If the train is late, we'll take a taxi downtown.
sentences.r: Huǒchē yàoshi wǎndiǎn, wǒmen jiù dǎchē qù shìzhōngxīn.

sentences.t: 我头疼，但我不想去看医生。
sentences.en: My head hurts, but I don't want to go to the doctor.
sentences.r: Wǒ tóu téng, dàn wǒ bù xiǎng qù kàn yīshēng.

sentences.t: 虽然我工作一整天，晚上还是会学习。
sentences.en: Even though I work all day, I still study at night.
sentences.r: Suīrán wǒ gōngzuò yì zhěng tiān, wǎnshang háishi huì xuéxí.

sentences.t: 马可说你得每天练一点。
sentences.en: Marco says you've got to practice a little every day.
sentences.r: Marco shuō nǐ děi měitiān liàn yìdiǎn.

sentences.t: 我今天不忙，所以有空见你。
sentences.en: I'm not busy today, so I'm free to see you.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān bù máng, suǒyǐ yǒu kòng jiàn nǐ.

sentences.t: 我觉得学语言就像去健身房。
sentences.en: I think learning a language is like going to the gym.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde xué yǔyán jiù xiàng qù jiànshēnfáng.

sentences.t: 我想多说点，但我懂的词还不够多。
sentences.en: I'd like to say more, but I still don't know that many words.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng duō shuō diǎn, dàn wǒ dǒng de cí hái bú gòu duō.

sentences.t: 要是早上不吃东西，我就工作不好。
sentences.en: If I don't eat in the morning, I can't work well.
sentences.r: Yàoshi zǎoshang bù chī dōngxi, wǒ jiù gōngzuò bù hǎo.

sentences.t: 他说他是我朋友，但他不是。
sentences.en: He says he's my friend, but he's not.
sentences.r: Tā shuō tā shì wǒ péngyou, dàn tā bú shì.

sentences.t: 我不知道怎么回事，但她总能懂我的意思。
sentences.en: I don't know how, but she always knows what I mean.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào zěnme huí shì, dàn tā zǒng néng dǒng wǒ de yìsi.

sentences.t: 我不知道你认不认识她，但她知道你是谁。
sentences.en: I don't know if you know her, but she knows who you are.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào nǐ rèn bu rènshi tā, dàn tā zhīdào nǐ shì shéi.

sentences.t: 有人说你不行的时候，问问他们是谁定的。
sentences.en: When someone says you can't, ask them who decided that.
sentences.r: Yǒu rén shuō nǐ bùxíng de shíhou, wènwen tāmen shì shéi dìng de.

sentences.t: 我知道你想认识那个人，但耐心点。
sentences.en: I know you want to meet that person, but be patient.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào nǐ xiǎng rènshi nàge rén, dàn nàixīn diǎn.

sentences.t: 听着，我不想你生气，但我把你的书弄丢了。
sentences.en: Look, I don't want you to get mad, but I lost your book.
sentences.r: Tīngzhe, wǒ bù xiǎng nǐ shēngqì, dàn wǒ bǎ nǐ de shū nòngdiū le.

sentences.t: 我刚开始的时候一切都很难，但现在简单多了。
sentences.en: When I started, everything was hard, but now it's easier.
sentences.r: Wǒ gāng kāishǐ de shíhou yíqiè dōu hěn nán, dàn xiànzài jiǎndān duō le.

sentences.t: 我以前觉得这不可能，但我想我错了。
sentences.en: I used to think it was impossible, but I think I was wrong.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐqián juéde zhè bù kěnéng, dàn wǒ xiǎng wǒ cuò le.

sentences.t: 我把钥匙放桌上了，就在你手机旁边。
sentences.en: I left the keys on the table, next to your phone.
sentences.r: Wǒ bǎ yàoshi fàng zhuō shàng le, jiù zài nǐ shǒujī pángbiān.

sentences.t: 她起床、洗澡、穿衣服，十分钟搞定。
sentences.en: She gets up, showers, and gets dressed in ten minutes.
sentences.r: Tā qǐchuáng、xǐzǎo、chuān yīfu, shí fēnzhōng gǎodìng.

sentences.t: 我是个开心的人，但这阵子又累又烦。
sentences.en: I'm a happy person, but these days I'm tired and worried.
sentences.r: Wǒ shì ge kāixīn de rén, dàn zhè zhènzi yòu lèi yòu fán.

sentences.t: 不尝尝当地的菜，你就算不上真正了解这地方。
sentences.en: If you don't try the local food, you don't really know the place.
sentences.r: Bù chángchang dāngdì de cài, nǐ jiù suàn bù shàng zhēnzhèng liǎojiě zhè dìfang.

sentences.t: 哪儿都一个价，别再费劲找了。
sentences.en: It costs the same everywhere, so don't bother looking more.
sentences.r: Nǎr dōu yí ge jià, bié zài fèijìn zhǎo le.

sentences.t: 我赶时间，因为我孩子得上学。
sentences.en: I'm in a hurry because my kid has to go to school.
sentences.r: Wǒ gǎn shíjiān, yīnwèi wǒ háizi děi shàngxué.

sentences.t: 早上我吃得少，晚上吃得多。
sentences.en: In the morning I eat little, but at night I eat a lot.
sentences.r: Zǎoshang wǒ chī de shǎo, wǎnshang chī de duō.

sentences.t: 马可坐错了公交，现在认识了整座城市。
sentences.en: Marco got on the wrong bus and now knows the whole city.
sentences.r: Marco zuò cuò le gōngjiāo, xiànzài rènshi le zhěng zuò chéngshì.

sentences.t: 马可说厨房是家里最好的房间。
sentences.en: Marco says the kitchen is the best room in the house.
sentences.r: Marco shuō chúfáng shì jiā lǐ zuì hǎo de fángjiān.

sentences.t: 我昨天认识了你朋友，已经看出来他是个好人。
sentences.en: I met your friend yesterday and I already know he's a good person.
sentences.r: Wǒ zuótiān rènshi le nǐ péngyou, yǐjīng kàn chūlái tā shì ge hǎorén.

sentences.t: 光知道规则不够，你还得了解人。
sentences.en: It's not enough to know the rules; you have to know the people.
sentences.r: Guāng zhīdào guīzé bú gòu, nǐ hái děi liǎojiě rén.

sentences.t: 我忙一整天的话，晚上就特别累。
sentences.en: When I'm busy all day, at night I'm really tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ máng yì zhěng tiān de huà, wǎnshang jiù tèbié lèi.

sentences.t: 不好意思，这趟公交是去火车站的吗？
sentences.en: Excuse me, is this the bus that goes to the train station?
sentences.r: Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè tàng gōngjiāo shì qù huǒchē zhàn de ma?

sentences.t: 你要是住得近，这周末该过来玩玩。
sentences.en: If you live nearby, you should come over this weekend.
sentences.r: Nǐ yàoshi zhù de jìn, zhè zhōumò gāi guòlái wánwan.

sentences.t: 听着，我给你最后一个建议，然后你想怎样都行。
sentences.en: Look, I'll give you one last piece of advice and then you do whatever you want.
sentences.r: Tīngzhe, wǒ gěi nǐ zuìhòu yí ge jiànyì, ránhòu nǐ xiǎng zěnyàng dōu xíng.

sentences.t: 我给他指了路，结果他最后还是选了另一边。
sentences.en: I showed him the way, but in the end he chose to look the other way.
sentences.r: Wǒ gěi tā zhǐ le lù, jiéguǒ tā zuìhòu háishi xuǎn le lìng yìbiān.

sentences.t: 每天都一样：我起床、工作、吃饭、睡觉。
sentences.en: Every day is the same: I get up, work, eat, and go to bed.
sentences.r: Měitiān dōu yíyàng: wǒ qǐchuáng、gōngzuò、chīfàn、shuìjiào.

sentences.t: 我看得出你变了，但我不知道喜不喜欢。
sentences.en: I can see you've changed, and I don't know whether I like it or not.
sentences.r: Wǒ kàn de chū nǐ biàn le, dàn wǒ bù zhīdào xǐ bu xǐhuan.

sentences.t: 你说得对，我得休息，但我得先把这个做完。
sentences.en: You're right that I need to rest, but I have to finish this first.
sentences.r: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ děi xiūxi, dàn wǒ děi xiān bǎ zhège zuò wán.

sentences.t: 我房间以前挨着我妹妹的，我们老是吵架。
sentences.en: My room used to be next to my sister's and we always fought.
sentences.r: Wǒ fángjiān yǐqián āizhe wǒ mèimei de, wǒmen lǎoshi chǎojià.

sentences.t: 学习的好处就是，你永远不知道会遇到谁。
sentences.en: The good thing about learning is you never know who you're going to meet.
sentences.r: Xuéxí de hǎochù jiùshì, nǐ yǒngyuǎn bù zhīdào huì yùdào shéi.

sentences.t: 我觉得每天学一点，比一天学一大堆要好。
sentences.en: I think it's better to do a little every day than a lot in one day.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde měitiān xué yìdiǎn, bǐ yìtiān xué yí dà duī yào hǎo.

sentences.t: 我之前特别难受，但医生给了我点药，现在好了。
sentences.en: I felt awful, but the doctor gave me something and now I'm fine.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīqián tèbié nánshòu, dàn yīshēng gěi le wǒ diǎn yào, xiànzài hǎo le.

sentences.t: 我觉得我今天做得比昨天好，这让我很开心。
sentences.en: I think I did it better today than yesterday, and that makes me happy.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒ jīntiān zuò de bǐ zuótiān hǎo, zhè ràng wǒ hěn kāixīn.

sentences.t: 我在这儿好多年了，还是觉得对这城市什么都不熟。
sentences.en: I've been here for years and I still feel like I don't know the city or anything.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài zhèr hǎoduō nián le, háishi juéde duì zhè chéngshì shénme dōu bù shú.

sentences.t: 一直走，往右拐，酒店就在左边，很近。
sentences.en: Go straight, turn right, and the hotel is close, on the left.
sentences.r: Yìzhí zǒu, wǎng yòu guǎi, jiǔdiàn jiù zài zuǒbiān, hěn jìn.

sentences.t: 等我终于找到它，才发现它一直就在旁边。
sentences.en: When I finally found it, I realized it had been close the whole time.
sentences.r: Děng wǒ zhōngyú zhǎodào tā, cái fāxiàn tā yìzhí jiù zài pángbiān.

sentences.t: 马可说一天只要十分钟，但你得天天都做。
sentences.en: Marco says you only need ten minutes a day, but you have to do them every single day.
sentences.r: Marco shuō yìtiān zhǐyào shí fēnzhōng, dàn nǐ děi tiāntiān dōu zuò.

sentences.t: 你要是问我，我会说每天练习是最管用的。
sentences.en: If you asked me, I'd tell you that practicing every day is what helps the most.
sentences.r: Nǐ yàoshi wèn wǒ, wǒ huì shuō měitiān liànxí shì zuì guǎnyòng de.

sentences.t: 到我这年纪，我懒得吵了，就想来杯好咖啡。
sentences.en: At my age I don't feel like arguing anymore, I just feel like a good coffee.
sentences.r: Dào wǒ zhè niánjì, wǒ lǎnde chǎo le, jiù xiǎng lái bēi hǎo kāfēi.
